title: Debug assertion sqlite3VdbeMemAboutToChange: Assertion `(mFlags&MEM_Real)==0 || pMem->u.r==pX->u.r' failed
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t2(c1 String, c2 Float64) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY c1;
CREATE TABLE t1(c0 Float64, c1 String, c2 Int32) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY c0;
ALTER TABLE t1 ADD CONSTRAINT fk_c0 FOREIGN KEY (c0) REFERENCES t2(c1);

key_bug_features: Foreign key constraint with real number in unique column
